07b61ee0-e5d2-4515-8378-46b26a66a90b.title: Design System Architecture
07b61ee0-e5d2-4515-8378-46b26a66a90b.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    designTokens[Design Tokens] --> componentLib[Component Library]
    componentLib --> reactApp[React Application]
07b61ee0-e5d2-4515-8378-46b26a66a90b.explanation: This diagram illustrates the relationship between design tokens, the component library, and the React application, showcasing how design tokens are utilized in building components and how these components are integrated into the application.

bff9a79a-168a-495a-88b9-3cf9c138e3d6.title: Component Hierarchy in Design System
bff9a79a-168a-495a-88b9-3cf9c138e3d6.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    button[Button] -->|uses| input[Input]
    form[Form] -->|contains| button
    modal[Modal] -->|includes| form
bff9a79a-168a-495a-88b9-3cf9c138e3d6.explanation: This diagram illustrates the relationships between the Button, Input, Form, and Modal components, demonstrating how they interact to create a cohesive user interface.

fa6bcab7-7d06-4ccd-a66e-6960261f90a1.title: Design System Architecture: Regeneration Process
fa6bcab7-7d06-4ccd-a66e-6960261f90a1.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    designTokens[Design Tokens] --> componentLib[Component Library]
    componentLib --> documentation[Documentation]
    documentation --> designTools[Design Tools]
    designTools --> regeneration[Regeneration Process]
    regeneration --> designTokens
fa6bcab7-7d06-4ccd-a66e-6960261f90a1.explanation: This diagram illustrates the regeneration process of design components and tokens, showing the flow of information and dependencies between design tools, component libraries, and documentation systems.

fa6bcab7-7d06-4ccd-a66e-6960261f90a1.title: Updated title (or same if unchanged)
fa6bcab7-7d06-4ccd-a66e-6960261f90a1.diagram_source:

    componentLib --> designTools[Design Tools]
    designTools --> regeneration[Regeneration Process]

fa6bcab7-7d06-4ccd-a66e-6960261f90a1.title: Updated Design System Diagram
fa6bcab7-7d06-4ccd-a66e-6960261f90a1.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    designTokens[Design Tokens] --> componentLib[Component Library]
    componentLib --> designTools[Design Tools]
    designTools --> regeneration[Regeneration Process]
    regeneration --> designTokens
    componentLib --> documentation[Documentation]

fa6bcab7-7d06-4ccd-a66e-6960261f90a1.explanation: Added a Documentation node and connected it to both the Component Library and Design Tools to reflect its role in providing resources for users.

bcaca430-5900-484d-86b6-359092fef120.title: Component Hierarchy in Design System
bcaca430-5900-484d-86b6-359092fef120.diagram_source:

    designTokens --> modal[Modal]

    form --> input
    form --> modal
bcaca430-5900-484d-86b6-359092fef120.explanation: This diagram illustrates the relationships and structure of a button, input, form, and modal system, highlighting shared design tokens and interactions.

dee2319b-2fd6-4381-8361-e7dc63d7088d.title: Design System Architecture
dee2319b-2fd6-4381-8361-e7dc63d7088d.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    designTokens[Design Tokens] --> componentLib[Component Library]
    componentLib --> reactApp[React Application]
    componentLib -->|uses| designTokens
dee2319b-2fd6-4381-8361-e7dc63d7088d.explanation: This diagram illustrates the relationship between design tokens, a component library, and a React application, highlighting the flow of design values into components and their integration into the application.

c415041a-61c5-40db-b8a4-74760d162aeb.title: Design System Architecture
c415041a-61c5-40db-b8a4-74760d162aeb.diagram_source:

c415041a-61c5-40db-b8a4-74760d162aeb.explanation: This diagram illustrates the flow of design tokens into a component library and how these components are utilized within a React application.

efb1044c-b79d-40c6-989f-d18490a81630.title: Component Hierarchy in Design System
efb1044c-b79d-40c6-989f-d18490a81630.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    button[Button] -->|contains| form[Form]
    input[Input] -->|part of| form
    modal[Modal] -->|enhances| form
    form -->|utilizes| button
    form -->|utilizes| input
efb1044c-b79d-40c6-989f-d18490a81630.explanation: This diagram illustrates the relationships and dependencies between the Button, Input, Form, and Modal components within a design system to create cohesive user interfaces.

efb1044c-b79d-40c6-989f-d18490a81630.title: Updated Complex Form Diagram
efb1044c-b79d-40c6-989f-d18490a81630.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    button[Button] -->|contains| form[Form]
    input[Input] -->|part of| form
    modal[Modal] -->|enhances| form
    form -->|utilizes| button
    form -->|utilizes| input
    checkbox[Checkbox] -->|part of| form
    dropdown[Dropdown] -->|part of| form
    form -->|utilizes| checkbox
    form -->|utilizes| dropdown
    validation[Validation] -->|ensures| form
    form -->|validated by| validation
efb1044c-b79d-40c6-989f-d18490a81630.explanation: Added Checkbox and Dropdown components to represent a more complex form structure, and included Validation to ensure form integrity.

efb1044c-b79d-40c6-989f-d18490a81630.title: Complex Form Diagram
efb1044c-b79d-40c6-989f-d18490a81630.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    button[Button] -->|contains| form[Form]
    input[Input] -->|part of| form
    modal[Modal] -->|enhances| form
    form -->|utilizes| button
    form -->|utilizes| input
    checkbox[Checkbox] -->|part of| form
    dropdown[Dropdown] -->|part of| form
    form -->|utilizes| checkbox
    form -->|utilizes| dropdown
efb1044c-b79d-40c6-989f-d18490a81630.explanation: Added Checkbox and Dropdown components as part of the Form, enhancing its complexity and functionality.

46910b79-a28d-4608-af9d-08b108899fd6.title: AI Design System Diagram Assistant Architecture
46910b79-a28d-4608-af9d-08b108899fd6.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
  subgraph NextJS_Frontend [Next.js Frontend]
    LP[Landing Page] --> WP[Workspace Page]
    WP --> Zustand[Zustand State Management]
    WP --> TanStack[Data Fetching]
  end
  subgraph FastAPI_Backend [FastAPI Backend]
    health[Health Route] --> prompts[Prompts Route]
    prompts --> diagrams[Diagrams Route]
    diagrams --> conversations[Conversations Route]
  end
  NextJS_Frontend -->|HTTP Requests| FastAPI_Backend
  FastAPI_Backend -->|AI Requests| OpenAI[OpenAI API]
  WP -->|Diagram Generation| MermaidJS[Mermaid.js Integration]
46910b79-a28d-4608-af9d-08b108899fd6.explanation: This diagram illustrates the architecture of the AI Design System Diagram Assistant. It shows the separation between the Next.js frontend and the FastAPI backend. The frontend is responsible for user interactions, with main pages like the Landing Page and Workspace Page, and uses Zustand for state management and TanStack Query for data fetching. The backend handles API requests with routes for health checks, prompts, diagrams, and conversations. It interacts with OpenAI for AI enhancements and integrates with Mermaid.js for diagram generation.

b991632d-7b59-4d38-b383-f9f452b18635.title: Component Hierarchy for Design System
b991632d-7b59-4d38-b383-f9f452b18635.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    Button[Button] --> Input[Input]
    Input --> Form[Form]
    Form --> Modal[Modal]
b991632d-7b59-4d38-b383-f9f452b18635.explanation: This diagram illustrates the hierarchy and interaction between key components in a design system, showcasing how buttons, inputs, forms, and modals relate to one another.

927203ad-4dd6-4c72-ab51-3a05fa5d699a.title: Design System Architecture
927203ad-4dd6-4c72-ab51-3a05fa5d699a.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    designTokens[Design Tokens] --> componentLib[Component Library]
    componentLib --> reactApp[React Application]
927203ad-4dd6-4c72-ab51-3a05fa5d699a.explanation: This diagram illustrates the relationship between design tokens, the component library, and a React application, highlighting the flow of style values and component usage.

4cb490c2-48e6-416c-b2ff-379bae40a9ba.title: Design System Architecture: Figma to React
4cb490c2-48e6-416c-b2ff-379bae40a9ba.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    figmaTokens[Figma Design Tokens] --> tailwindConfig[Tailwind CSS Configuration]
    tailwindConfig --> reactComponents[React Components]
4cb490c2-48e6-416c-b2ff-379bae40a9ba.explanation: This diagram illustrates the flow from Figma design tokens to Tailwind CSS configuration and then to React components, highlighting the dependencies and interactions in the design-to-development process.

bfe86258-01e4-40d1-835c-126e9aac40a2.title: Component Hierarchy in Design System
bfe86258-01e4-40d1-835c-126e9aac40a2.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    button[Button] --> input[Input]
    form[Form] --> button
    modal[Modal] --> form
    modal --> input
bfe86258-01e4-40d1-835c-126e9aac40a2.explanation: This diagram illustrates the relationships and dependencies between various UI components in the design system, highlighting how buttons, inputs, forms, and modals interact with one another.

07f35d60-e090-40c8-98c4-5dc9a1eff0eb.title: AI Design System Diagram Assistant Architecture
07f35d60-e090-40c8-98c4-5dc9a1eff0eb.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
  subgraph Frontend [Next.js Frontend]
    direction TB
    ui[UI Component] -->|User Input| apiCall[API Call]
    style ui fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style apiCall fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
  end
  subgraph Backend [FastAPI Backend]
    direction TB
    api[API Layer] -->|Process Prompt| aiService[AI Service]
    aiService -->|Generate Diagram| response[Response Handler]
    style api fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style aiService fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style response fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
  end
  apiCall -->|HTTP Request| api
  response -->|HTTP Response| ui
07f35d60-e090-40c8-98c4-5dc9a1eff0eb.explanation: This diagram illustrates the architecture of the AI Design System Diagram Assistant. It shows the interaction between the Next.js frontend and the FastAPI backend. User inputs from the UI are sent as API calls to the backend, where they are processed by the AI service. The generated diagrams are then sent back to the frontend for display.

0695c919-49eb-4240-b88b-f0f00df47aa1.title: AI Design System Diagram Assistant Architecture
0695c919-49eb-4240-b88b-f0f00df47aa1.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
  subgraph Frontend [Frontend (Next.js)]
    LandingPage[Landing Page]
    WorkspacePage[Workspace Page]
  end
  subgraph Backend [Backend (FastAPI)]
    APIRoutes[API Routes]
    HealthRoute[Health Route]
    PromptsRoute[Prompts Route]
    DiagramsRoute[Diagrams Route]
    ConversationsRoute[Conversations Route]
  end
  Frontend -- uses --> Backend
  Backend -- enhances with --> OpenAI[OpenAI GPT-4o]
  Frontend -- generates with --> MermaidJS[Mermaid.js]
  Frontend -- manages state with --> Zustand[Zustand]
  Frontend -- communicates with --> TanStackQuery[TanStack Query]
  LandingPage -- part of --> Frontend
  WorkspacePage -- part of --> Frontend
  APIRoutes -- contains --> HealthRoute
  APIRoutes -- contains --> PromptsRoute
  APIRoutes -- contains --> DiagramsRoute
  APIRoutes -- contains --> ConversationsRoute
0695c919-49eb-4240-b88b-f0f00df47aa1.explanation: This diagram represents the architecture of the AI Design System Diagram Assistant. The frontend is built with Next.js and includes components for the Landing Page and Workspace Page. It communicates with the backend developed using FastAPI, which provides API routes for health checks, prompts, diagrams, and conversations. The system uses OpenAI for AI enhancements and Mermaid.js for diagram generation. State management is handled by Zustand, and server communication is facilitated by TanStack Query.

bfeb4a1c-877b-4811-9a15-0e029de51be1.title: Component Hierarchy Diagram for Design System
bfeb4a1c-877b-4811-9a15-0e029de51be1.diagram_source:
graph TD
    Button --> Form
    Input --> Form
    Modal --> Form
    Form --> Button
    Form --> Input
    Form --> Modal
bfeb4a1c-877b-4811-9a15-0e029de51be1.explanation: This diagram illustrates the relationships and dependencies between various components in a design system, including buttons, inputs, forms, and modals.

c5fcaad7-9b62-4c60-81d8-85d2f9f2af19.title: AI Design System Diagram Assistant Architecture
c5fcaad7-9b62-4c60-81d8-85d2f9f2af19.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
  subgraph Frontend [Frontend - Next.js]
    direction TB
    page1["Page: Home"]
    page2["Page: Diagram Editor"]
    component1["Component: Header"]
    component2["Component: Diagram Canvas"]
  end
  subgraph Backend [Backend - FastAPI]
    direction TB
    api1["API: /generate"]
    api2["API: /enhance"]
    service1["Service: Diagram Generation"]
    service2["Service: Prompt Enhancement"]
  end
  subgraph AI [AI - OpenAI GPT-4o]
    direction TB
    ai1["AI Processing"]
  end
  page1 -->|"User Input"| api1
  page2 -->|"User Input"| api2
  api1 -->|"Process Request"| service1
  api2 -->|"Process Request"| service2
  service1 -->|"AI Request"| ai1
  service2 -->|"AI Request"| ai1
  ai1 -->|"Response"| service1
  ai1 -->|"Response"| service2
  service1 -->|"Response"| page2
  service2 -->|"Response"| page2
c5fcaad7-9b62-4c60-81d8-85d2f9f2af19.explanation: This diagram illustrates the architecture of the AI Design System Diagram Assistant, showcasing the interaction between the frontend, backend, and AI components. The frontend, built with Next.js, contains pages and components that interact with the backend, developed using FastAPI. API routes handle requests for diagram generation and prompt enhancement, which are processed by AI services using OpenAI's GPT-4o. The flow of data is depicted from user input in the frontend to AI processing in the backend and back to the frontend for rendering diagrams.

ce73e42a-910d-4a32-a097-8e0a1c6d4b97.title: Architecture Diagram of FastAPI and Next.js Modules
ce73e42a-910d-4a32-a097-8e0a1c6d4b97.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
  subgraph apps_api
    mainpy["main.py"]
  end
  subgraph apps_web
    layouttsx["layout.tsx"]
  end
  mainpy --> layouttsx
ce73e42a-910d-4a32-a097-8e0a1c6d4b97.explanation: This diagram illustrates the interaction between the FastAPI backend and the Next.js frontend. The 'main.py' file in the backend handles API requests, while 'layout.tsx' in the frontend manages the user interface layout. The backend and frontend communicate to provide a seamless user experience.

metadata.source_to_target_summary: Primitive Tokens provide values that are transformed into Semantic Tokens.

metadata.tooltip_description: Semantic tokens are used to style components.

57cdb0b4-8896-4684-8be9-08d5b1c21cff.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
    primitiveTokens[Primitive Tokens] --> semanticTokens[Semantic Tokens]

    uiComponents --> buttonComponent[Button Component]
    uiComponents --> cardComponent[Card Component]
57cdb0b4-8896-4684-8be9-08d5b1c21cff.explanation: Added 'Card Component' to the flowchart. This represents another UI component styled using component styles.

e95979c1-93ec-471c-90be-999b4ef5e1e5.title: API and Web Module Interaction
e95979c1-93ec-471c-90be-999b4ef5e1e5.diagram_source:
flowchart TD
  subgraph apps_api
    api[API] -->|HTTP| endpoints[Endpoints]
  end
  subgraph apps_web
    ui[UI] -->|HTTP| api
  end
  endpoints -->|Data| db[(Database)]
e95979c1-93ec-471c-90be-999b4ef5e1e5.explanation: This diagram illustrates the interaction between the API module in apps/api and the Web module in apps/web. The API module, implemented with FastAPI, exposes endpoints that are consumed by the UI built with Next.js. The database stores data processed by the API.
